response.justification: While the candidate has roughly 17 years of software development experience and meets the tenure floor, the profile is that of a hands-on full-stack and systems engineer, not an AI strategist or director-level individual contributor. AI involvement is limited to a single recent role (April 2025) doing MCP tooling, with no demonstrated history of building or shipping AI-powered products at scale, no cloud architecture leadership, no strategic customer advisory experience, and no advanced AI credentials. The role requires recognized AI expertise and the ability to advise enterprises on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption — a profile this resume does not support.
strengths: Long, continuous engineering career spanning 17+ years across diverse stacks and domains
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work signals genuine early engagement with the AI space
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective founder role and open-source project leadership
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — no prior ML, model development, or AI platform work before 2025
No cloud architecture leadership; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is the only cloud reference
No evidence of director-level scope, strategic advisory, or external thought leadership in AI
